Jon: 	Okay, we’re going to get into part 5 now: the actions and results.
Now, what do I mean by that? Again, this is a short segment.
Future-paced specific actions. We’ve already gone through the
present-paced pain and the future-paced pleasure. Now, we’re going
to future-pace their specific actions. “Here’s what you’re going to do
the moment you get blank.”
We’re already future-paced them through the ordering process.
Chances are very great, at this point, they’re not even watching.
They’ve already ordered the product. But in case they are, here’s what
we’re going to do.
So, “After you order, do this.” That’s kind of the mantra.
Remember, overview one, I’m going to ask them to remember,
because we know what that does psychologically, specific things about
the offer: the discount, the value, the benefits, the bonuses.
I’m going to do this very fast, by the way. It’s not 20 slides. It’s very
short.
Then, 3 reasons you must act now. I’m getting to the point, and you
are too, at this point in your video sales letter, where if someone has
not bought, it’s time to pull out all the stops. We really pull it out in part
6. We really pull it out.
But we’re going to start doing it, right now. Here’s why you must act
right now. And you need to give 3 honest, specific reasons. It’s called
scarcity.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

2
You’re going to tell them to do the smart thing, and then you’re going to
add 3X CTA, but you’re going to add a 5-second pause at the end, and
I’ll show you why.
So, we’re going to future-pace the buy, and we’re going to instruct the
customer on where to go first, when they buy it, to get the fastest
results.
So, here’s what these slides may look like.
“Immediately after you order” – you can say today – “you need to go to
the download section. You need to download this, the Every Other
Day Diet Quick Start To Weight Loss.” I might even have a picture
here.
“Download this first, then flip to page 4 to begin your dieter’s
assessment. This simple, one-page assessment will guarantee you
begin on the specific EODD diet plan that’s best for your body type.”
So, again, I’m talking about benefits here. I’m telling them to go to a
specific page in a specific download the moment they buy it, so there’s
no confusion. I’m directing them as if they’ve already done it. “Go to
this page, and here’s what you’re going to get, benefit, the specific plan
that works best for your body type. It’s that simple.
Next, you want yet another reminder of the benefits, the values of
purchasing, along with reminding the customer on the order specifics
bonuses and so on. This is just to reminder stuff. So, you’ll start off
with that keyword. “Remember, along with your Quick Start Guide,
you’ll also be receiving…”
So, just tied the Quick Start Guide right back into it, because I just
talked about it. You’ll also be receiving the complete new edition of the
Every Other Day Diet. This is your easy-to-follow formula for a
lifestyle-friendly weight loss system that incorporates all your favorite
foods, every week.”
Does this sound familiar? It really should, because I am repeating and
just rewording, in a slightly different way, the same exact pitch I’ve
already given them. And the reason why is this is a remember
overview. I am merely asking someone to remember something.
Redundancy is fine in video sales letters.
“So, you’re not only going to get this Quick Start Guide, here’s what
you’re going to get. You’re going to get the book, and here’s the
benefit of the book.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

3
So, notice what I do. I say, “Get the product, benefit of the product.
Get the bonus, benefit of the bonus.
Same thing here. “Perfect posture in 30 days.” That’s the bonus. “So,
you can immediately increase your sex appeal.” That’s the benefit.
“Protect your back from wear-and-tear.”
“Cholesterol Lies, a book that will save you a fortune in medication and
doctor bills.” See what I’m doing? Product, in this case bonus, benefit.
“Hormones 101, your handbook for reclaiming your youthful, fat-
burning hormones. And, my super bonus, the Virtual Exercise
Demonstrator, so you never, ever guess which exercise works the best
or how to do it correctly.”
That’s it. I’ve just reminded of the whole thing in 4 slides. I think that
might have been 5, with the Every Other Day Diet being 2. That’s so
simple.
Next, you’re going to want to provide 3 compelling reasons to act right
now, and this is scarcity. So, here are some example slides on how to
do that.
“Just do not put this off one second longer. And here’s why…”
So, what have I done here? I’ve given them a direct command. “Do
not put this off one second longer. Here is why…”
You’re going to say, “Okay, 3 reason I must act now. What are those 3
reasons?” First, as you recall, I lowered the price by over half, just so
you could jump in now. Yet, eventually, I’m going to have to raise that
price back up, to be where it really deserves to be. So, act now, before
that happens.”
I threaten a price raise on them. Okay?
Also, you do not want to feel left out. If my super-bonus, the Exercise
Generator, taps out its membership quota, only the first-comers will be
guaranteed access to this, so everybody else is going to be out of luck.
Again, I tell them if they close the video, they won’t get this, and there’s
only a limited number of people that we allow in there, because it’s a
database. So, it’s basically first-come. And I include it with one last
line, “And let’s not forget, unless you take action now, today, you may
never take action. You may do what some people do, and put it off just
a few more days, which will turn into months, then years. So, let’s
make sure you get what you really want.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

4
Notice how I end this? “This is what you really want. I want to make
sure you get what you really want.”
If I wanted to, by the way, on this slide, I could keep going for several
slides, I could build a pain mechanism that would just be aweful. I
could say, “Look, you’ll put this off for days, months, then years. Your
health will begin to deteriorate, your energy will drop to next to nothing,
you’ll keep gaining weight, you’ll lose friends. You may even lose your
marriage.”
If I wanted to, I could twist the knife so deep. But I just didn’t do it
here.
“So, let’s make sure you get what you really want.” And what do they
really want? They want the answer. They want the answer. And the
answer is found in your product. Not an answer, the answer.
And, that is what I call the smart thing. What they really want is the
answer, and that’s a smart thing.
So, reassure them that their decision to buy is the only smart decision
that they can make. So, here’s all I do. “And do the only smart thing
that you can do.”
Now, what have I done here? It’s like, “Okay, get what you really want,
and do the only smart you can do.” It’s the only smart thing.
So, if they don’t take action, what’s the first word that comes to your
mind, if they don’t take action? Dumb. No one wants to be dumb. So,
I tell them, “That’s the only smart thing you can do,” and I underline the
word “can,” because it’s a powerful word. “Take advantage of this
limited time offer while you still can. And wisely,” power word, “get on
the right path to a sane, simple and friendly journey to weight loss
today.”
Notice what I’ve done here. I just said, “This is the wise choice. You
want to wisely get on the right path. This is going to give you,” benefit.
“It’s a sane, simple, friendly journey. It’s the benefit to weight loss.”
These are the little benefits to this particular form of weight loss, and
do it today.
And part 5 is going to conclude with the 3X CTA. It’s with a twist.
Remember, I mentioned that 5-second pause at the end of the CTA?
Well, what you’re going to do is you’re going to let the user see an
arrow that points downward, towards your order button, and this is kind
of like a fake end of your video. It’s kind of cool.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 5 --

5
After the 5-second pause, we’re going to jump right back in, and we’re
going to conclude the grand offer with section part 6 of the Q&A.
So, here’s how this looks. “Click the add-to-cart orange, rectangular
button below,” I told you I was going to say that, “and let’s get you
started now.
So, on this page, what do I have? An arrow pointing down, that’s
going to be pointing right at that add-to-cart button, all of the books and
bonuses, and the satisfaction guaranteed, and I’d probably put also the
exercise demonstrator in here, if this was a real video sales letter.
So, this is what I’d do. “So, click this orange button and let’s get
started now.” And at this point, I stop for 5 seconds, and you would not
hear anything. It would literally say, “And let’s get you started now,”
with this long gap. And they’re thinking, “Okay, it’s over.” Right? Well,
it’s not over.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
